all.en: Subject: Important — Year-End Tax Documentation and W-2 Distribution Schedule
all.zh: 主旨：重要事項 — 年終報稅文件與 W-2 表發放時程

all.en: Dear Valued Employees,
all.zh: 敬愛的全體同仁，

all.en: As the calendar year draws to a close, Human Resources is pleased to share key tax updates.
all.zh: 隨年度將屆，人資處謹此向各位分享重要報稅資訊。

all.en: This memorandum outlines actions you must take before January 31st of next year.
all.zh: 本備忘錄列明各位於明年 1 月 31 日前需採取之行動。

all.en: Please read this notice in its entirety to avoid filing delays or penalties.
all.zh: 敬請完整詳閱本通知，以免延誤申報或遭罰。

all.en: Your annual W-2 form will be available no later than January 25th.
all.zh: 您的年度 W-2 表將於 1 月 25 日前提供。

all.en: Distribution will occur through two channels: the employee portal and postal mail.
all.zh: 發放方式採員工入口網站及實體郵寄兩種管道。

all.en: Electronic copies appear under the Payroll tab once payroll has been finalized.
all.zh: 電子版 W-2 將於薪資結算完成後出現於薪資頁籤。

all.en: Paper copies will be mailed to the residential address currently on file.
all.zh: 紙本將寄送至檔案內現存之居住地址。

all.en: Please verify your mailing address by December 20th of this year.
all.zh: 請於本年度 12 月 20 日前確認您的郵寄地址。

all.en: Address changes can be submitted through the self-service personal information page.
all.zh: 地址異動可於自助式個人資料頁面提交。

all.en: Outdated addresses may result in lost forms and potential identity exposure.
all.zh: 地址未更新可能導致表件遺失及個資洩漏風險。

all.en: If you opted into the paperless program, no physical copy will be mailed.
all.zh: 若您已選擇無紙化方案，將不會收到紙本。

all.en: You may opt in or out of paperless delivery at any time via the portal.
all.zh: 您可隨時透過入口網站選擇加入或退出無紙化遞送。

all.en: In addition to the W-2, certain employees will receive supplementary documents.
all.zh: 除 W-2 外，部分員工將收到補充文件。

all.en: Form 1095-C will be issued to those enrolled in our health insurance plan.
all.zh: 1095-C 表將發予加入本公司健保方案之員工。

all.en: Form 1099 applies to contractors and certain bonus-related earnings.
all.zh: 1099 表適用於外包人員及部分獎金性質之收入。

all.en: If you contributed to a 401(k), please retain your year-end account statement.
all.zh: 若您有 401(k) 提撥，請保留年終帳戶對帳單。

all.en: Statements will be released by our retirement provider during early February.
all.zh: 對帳單將由退休金服務機構於 2 月上旬發布。

all.en: Charitable donations made via payroll deduction will appear on the year-end summary.
all.zh: 透過薪資扣款之慈善捐款將列入年終彙總表內。

all.en: This summary serves as your acknowledgment letter for tax deduction purposes.
all.zh: 該彙總表可作為您報稅扣抵之認列證明。

all.en: Employees on international assignment should contact the global mobility team directly.
all.zh: 外派同仁請直接聯繫全球派遣團隊。

all.en: Cross-border tax situations often require additional documentation and consultation.
all.zh: 跨境稅務情境通常需要額外文件及諮詢。

all.en: We have partnered with a third-party tax advisor to support such cases.
all.zh: 我方已與第三方稅務顧問合作以支援此類個案。

all.en: Consultation vouchers will be distributed individually to qualifying employees.
all.zh: 諮詢券將個別發送予符合資格之同仁。

all.en: Please do not share these vouchers as they are non-transferable.
all.zh: 請勿轉讓相關諮詢券，該券不可轉移使用。

all.en: The IRS filing deadline this year falls on April 15th as usual.
all.zh: 本年度國稅局申報期限照例為 4 月 15 日。

all.en: Extension requests must be filed via Form 4868 before the deadline.
all.zh: 如需展延，須於期限前以 4868 表提出申請。

all.en: An extension grants additional filing time but does not delay payment obligations.
all.zh: 展延僅延長申報時間，但不延後繳稅義務。

all.en: Estimated tax payments should still be remitted by the original due date.
all.zh: 預估稅款仍應於原到期日前繳納。

all.en: We strongly recommend filing as early as possible to avoid last-minute issues.
all.zh: 我方強烈建議儘早申報，以免遭遇最後關頭之問題。

all.en: Identity theft cases tend to increase during tax season every year.
all.zh: 每逢報稅季，身分盜用案件均有上升趨勢。

all.en: Never share your Social Security number via email or unsecured channels.
all.zh: 切勿透過電郵或不安全管道分享社會安全號碼。

all.en: Legitimate IRS communications arrive by postal mail, not by phone or email.
all.zh: 國稅局正式通知皆以郵寄送達，而非電話或電郵。

all.en: If in doubt, please forward suspicious messages to the security operations team.
all.zh: 如有疑慮，請將可疑訊息轉寄予資安維運團隊。

all.en: A dedicated tax help session will be held on January 14th at 2 PM.
all.zh: 1 月 14 日下午 2 點將舉辦專屬報稅諮詢會。

all.en: The session will be hosted in Conference Room Aurora and streamed online.
all.zh: 會議將於 Aurora 會議室舉行並同步線上直播。

all.en: Topics will include W-2 walkthroughs, deductions, and state filing tips.
all.zh: 主題涵蓋 W-2 解讀、扣除項目及州稅申報要點。

all.en: Registration is required and limited to the first 80 attendees.
all.zh: 需事先報名，名額限額前 80 位。

all.en: Recording links will be circulated to all registrants within 48 hours.
all.zh: 錄影連結將於 48 小時內寄發予所有報名者。

all.en: Frequently asked questions are compiled in the HR knowledge base.
all.zh: 常見問題已整理於人資知識庫中。

all.en: Search for the tag year-end-tax-2025 to access the latest materials.
all.zh: 請以標籤 year-end-tax-2025 搜尋以取得最新資料。

all.en: For benefits-related tax questions, please contact the benefits help desk.
all.zh: 如有福利相關稅務問題，請洽福利服務窗口。

all.en: For payroll discrepancies, please open a ticket through HR Connect.
all.zh: 薪資資料如有差異，請透過 HR Connect 開單。

all.en: Tickets are typically resolved within three business days.
all.zh: 工單通常於三個工作天內處理完畢。

all.en: Critical issues affecting W-2 accuracy receive expedited handling.
all.zh: 影響 W-2 正確性之關鍵事項將獲優先處理。

all.en: Please review your final paystub of December to spot-check year-to-date totals.
all.zh: 請審閱 12 月最終薪資單，核對年度累計金額。

all.en: Discrepancies should be reported before December 28th for timely correction.
all.zh: 如有差異請於 12 月 28 日前回報，以利及時更正。

all.en: Once W-2 forms are issued, corrections require a W-2c amendment.
all.zh: W-2 發出後，更正需透過 W-2c 修正表辦理。

all.en: Amendments take significantly longer to process and complicate filing.
all.zh: 修正表處理所需時間顯著較長，並使申報程序更複雜。

all.en: Thank you in advance for your cooperation during this critical period.
all.zh: 在此關鍵期間，預先感謝各位的配合。

all.en: Our shared diligence ensures a smooth tax season for everyone involved.
all.zh: 我們共同的細心將確保所有相關人員順利度過報稅季。

all.en: Should you have additional questions, please contact HR at extension 8800.
all.zh: 如有其他疑問，請撥分機 8800 聯繫人資處。

all.en: Warm regards and best wishes for the upcoming year,
all.zh: 致上誠摯問候並祝新年順利，

all.en: Naomi Fisher, Vice President of Human Resources, Globex Headquarters
all.zh: Globex 總部人資處副總裁 Naomi Fisher
